eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 03:34 PM ON APR 16, 2026 Effective until 03:34 PM APR 17, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Due to an accident on I40, the town of Seligman is without power, and there are NO SERVICES between Kingman and Ash Fork, AZ. Travelers should fuel, eat, and rest in Kingman or Ash Fork. Cell phone service may also be compromised. Residents who need assistance with ice, food, water, etc., call Yavapai County Office of Emergency Management at 928-442-5103
